Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ruins]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Ruins is a location where the School's High Elder needs Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — The Ruins is a location containing tunnels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — The Ruins contain thick vital aura and many Remnants and dreadbeasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — The Ruins is a location where an enormous block can sink into the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Ruins are a location where excursions take place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan claims the Ruins may as well be his own home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Ruins contain a script on the walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Ruins is a location that the First Fisher intends to clean out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Ruins contain dreadbeasts and Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan scrounged sacred beasts from the Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — The Ruins contain a script-circle that could detonate the Transcendent Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Ruins contain contents that must be catalogued.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin fought Jai Long in the Ruins.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
